data.name: Auth.UnableToLogin
data.value: Melodee 无法让您登录。也许您被封禁了？

data.name: Auth.FailedToOpenGoogleSignIn
data.value: 无法打开 Google 登录

data.name: Auth.GoogleSessionExpired
data.value: 您的 Google 会话已过期。请重新登录。

data.name: Auth.GoogleAccountNotLinked
data.value: 此 Google 帐户未链接到任何 Melodee 帐户。请使用密码登录并从您的个人资料链接您的 Google 帐户。

data.name: Auth.SignupDisabled
data.value: 新帐户注册目前已禁用。请联系管理员。

data.name: Auth.ForbiddenTenant
data.value: 不允许使用您的 Google 帐户域。请使用其他帐户。

data.name: Auth.AccountDisabled
data.value: 您的帐户已被禁用。请联系支持。

data.name: Auth.GoogleSignInError
data.value: Google 登录期间发生错误。请重试。

data.name: Auth.SignInErrorTryAgain
data.value: 登录期间发生错误。请重试。

data.name: Auth.FillOutForm
data.value: 填写此表单并单击"注册"以创建新用户帐户。

data.name: Auth.AccessCodeRequired
data.value: 注册新帐户需要输入访问代码。邀请您的人可以为您提供此代码。

data.name: Auth.AccessCodeWarning
data.value: 如果您没有代码，请离开 👉。

data.name: Auth.UnableToCreateAccount
data.value: Melodee 无法为您创建新用户帐户。

data.name: Auth.PerhapsEmailBanned
data.value: 也许您的电子邮件被封禁了？

data.name: Auth.RegistrationSuccess
data.value: 已注册新帐户，您应该会收到一封电子邮件，请务必单击验证按钮。

data.name: Dashboard.TopPlayedSongsLast30Days
data.value: 最常播放的歌曲（最近30天）

data.name: Dashboard.NoPlayHistoryYet
data.value: 还没有播放历史。开始听音乐以查看您最喜欢的歌曲！

data.name: About.Description
data.value: Melodee 是一个现代化的音乐服务器系统，为管理和流式传输您的音乐收藏提供全面的解决方案。

data.name: Data.MergeConfirmation
data.value: 您确定要合并所选项目吗？

data.name: Data.DeleteConfirmation
data.value: 您确定要删除所选项目吗？

data.name: Data.SelectItemsToMerge
data.value: 选择至少 2 个项目进行合并

data.name: Data.ArtistLockedMessage
data.value: 艺术家已锁定。锁定的艺术家无法删除。

data.name: Data.SongLockedMessage
data.value: 歌曲已锁定。锁定的歌曲无法删除。

data.name: Data.DisplayingPage
data.value: 显示第 {0} 页，共 {1} 页（总共 {2} 条记录）

data.name: Data.SongMergingInfo
data.value: 歌曲合并允许合并多个歌曲条目。此功能需要仔细选择要合并的歌曲。

data.name: Data.PlaylistLockedMessage
data.value: 播放列表已锁定。锁定的播放列表无法删除。

data.name: Profile.EmailInvalid
data.value: 请输入有效的电子邮件地址

data.name: Profile.LanguageHelp
data.value: 选择您的首选语言。留空使用英语。

data.name: Profile.ThemeHelp
data.value: 选择您喜欢的界面主题。预览会立即应用；点击保存以持久化。

data.name: Profile.UnlinkConfirmation
data.value: 您确定要取消关联您的 Google 账户吗？您将无法再使用 Google 登录。

data.name: Profile.UnlinkGoogleAccount
data.value: 取消关联 Google 账户

data.name: Profile.InvalidTimeZoneDetail
data.value: '{0}' 不是有效的 IANA 时区 ID。

data.name: Profile.ProfileUpdatedDetail
data.value: 您的个人资料已成功更新。

data.name: Profile.GoogleUnlinkedSuccess
data.value: Google 账户取消关联成功。

data.name: Profile.GoogleLinkFailed
data.value: 关联 Google 账户失败

data.name: Profile.GoogleUnlinkFailed
data.value: 取消关联 Google 账户失败

data.name: Profile.GoogleSignInOpenFailed
data.value: 打开 Google 登录失败

data.name: Profile.LinkingError
data.value: 关联时发生错误。请重试。

data.name: Profile.UnlinkingError
data.value: 取消关联时发生错误。请重试。

data.name: Auth.RegistrationClosedMessage
data.value: 注册目前已关闭。请联系管理员。

data.name: Auth.ForgotPasswordDisabled
data.value: 通过电子邮件重置密码当前已禁用

data.name: Auth.ContactAdminToResetPassword
data.value: 请联系系统管理员重置您的密码。

data.name: Messages.UnsavedChanges
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] You have unsaved changes. Do you want to continue?

data.name: NowPlaying.NoSongsPlaying
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] No songs are currently playing.

data.name: AdminJobs.JobsDisabled
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Jobs are disabled in the appsettings.json file. Set the setting "{0}" to "false" (or remove entirely) to enable.

data.name: AdminJobs.NoJobsFound
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] No jobs found. Check your configuration and enable the Cron Expressions for Jobs in Settings.

data.name: AlbumDetail.DeleteAlbum
data.value: 删除该专辑及其所有专辑文件。请注意！

data.name: AlbumDetail.LockAlbum
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Lock album, will prevent modifications.

data.name: AlbumDetail.NotFeaturedOnCharts
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] This album is not featured on any charts.

data.name: AlbumDetail.RescanAlbum
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Rebuild metadata and rescan album folder.

data.name: AlbumDetail.SetAlbumCoverImage
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Set the album cover image.

data.name: AlbumDetail.UnlockAlbum
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Unlock album, will allow modifications.

data.name: AlbumEdit.ExternalSearchDescription
data.value: 用于获取专辑元数据的外部搜索集成。

data.name: AlbumEdit.ExternalSearchDetails
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] This feature allows searching external providers for album information.

data.name: ArtistDetail.DeleteArtistWarning
data.value: 删除该艺术家、其所有专辑以及所有专辑文件。请注意！

data.name: ArtistDetail.GenerateJson
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Generate JSON for for artist.

data.name: ArtistDetail.LockArtist
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Lock artist, will prevent modifications.

data.name: ArtistDetail.ReplaceAllImages
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Replace all images on upload

data.name: ArtistDetail.RescanArtist
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Rebuild metadata and rescan artists albums.

data.name: ArtistDetail.UnlockArtist
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Unlock artist, will allow modifications.

data.name: ArtistEdit.ExternalSearchDescription
data.value: 用于获取艺术家元数据的外部搜索集成。

data.name: ArtistEdit.ExternalSearchDetails
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] This feature allows searching external providers (iTunes, Last.fm, Spotify) for artist information.

data.name: ChartDetail.AlbumsNotFound
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] {0} albums not found in library

data.name: ChartDetail.AllAlbumsAvailable
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] All albums available to play

data.name: ChartEditor.CSVFormatDescription
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Format: Rank,Artist,Album,Year (optional) — one entry per line

data.name: ChartEditor.CSVFormatExample
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] 1,The Beatles,Abbey Road,1969\n2,Pink Floyd,The Dark Side of the Moon,1973...

data.name: ChartEditor.FixCSVErrors
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Please fix CSV errors before creating

data.name: ChartEditor.ImageSelectedWillUpload
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Image selected - will be uploaded when chart is created

data.name: ChartEditor.ImageSizeTooLarge
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Image file size must be less than 10MB.

data.name: ChartEditor.InvalidImageType
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Invalid image type. Allowed: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP.

data.name: ChartEditor.LinkingComplete
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Linking complete: {0} linked, {1} ambiguous, {2} unlinked, {3} skipped

data.name: ChartEditor.OverwriteManualLinks
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Do you want to overwrite manually resolved links?

data.name: ChartEditor.PasteCSVData
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Paste CSV data below. Format: Rank,ArtistName,AlbumTitle,Year (optional)

data.name: ChartEditor.PreviewCSVFirst
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Please preview the CSV first

data.name: ChartEditor.UploadImageDescription
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Upload an image for this chart. Supported formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP (max 10MB)

data.name: ChartEditor.ValidItemsReady
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] ✓ {0} valid items ready to import

data.name: ChartImportDialog.ItemsRequired
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] 'items' array is required and must contain at least one item.

data.name: ChartImportDialog.PasteJSON
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Paste JSON here or upload a file...

data.name: ChartItemResolveDialog.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: 按艺术家或专辑名称搜索...

data.name: Charts.ConfirmDeleteCharts
data.value: 确定要删除所选的 {0} 个榜单吗？

data.name: Charts.DeleteChartsConfirm
data.value: 确定要删除所选的 {0} 个榜单吗？

data.name: ChartsMissingReport.Description
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Albums that appear on charts but are not found in the database

data.name: ChartsRankedReport.Description
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Albums ranked by their aggregate position across multiple charts

data.name: Libraries.LockedLibraryMessage
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Library is locked. Locked libraries cannot be deleted.

data.name: LibraryDetail.BackgroundJobNotice
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] This action starts a background job.

data.name: LibraryDetail.CleanLibrary
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Clean library, removing any empty folders.

data.name: LibraryDetail.CleanTooltip
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Clean library, removing any empty folders.

data.name: LibraryDetail.LockLibrary
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Lock library, will prevent modifications.

data.name: LibraryDetail.LockTooltip
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Lock library, will prevent modifications.

data.name: LibraryDetail.ProcessLibrary
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Process media files into Melodee media json file.

data.name: LibraryDetail.ProcessMessage
data.value:
[NEEDS TRANSLATION]

Processing a library creates Melodee data files with media found. This could overwrite Melodee data files, images and songs.

This action starts a background job.

⚠️ There is no undo

data.name: LibraryDetail.ProcessTooltip
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Process media files into Melodee media json file.

data.name: LibraryDetail.ProcessWarning
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Processing a library creates Melodee data files with media found. This could overwrite Melodee data files, images and songs.

data.name: LibraryDetail.PurgeLibrary
data.value: 删除媒体库中的所有内容

data.name: LibraryDetail.PurgeMessage
data.value:
[NEEDS TRANSLATION]

Purging a library deletes all artists, albums and songs.

There is no undo

data.name: LibraryDetail.PurgeTooltip
data.value: 删除媒体库中的所有内容

data.name: LibraryDetail.PurgeWarning
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Purging a library deletes all artists, albums and songs.

data.name: LibraryDetail.ScanLibrary
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Scan for Melodee media json files and update database data.

data.name: LibraryDetail.ScanMessage
data.value:
[NEEDS TRANSLATION]

Scanning a library updates database information from Melodee data files.

This action starts a background job.

There is no undo

data.name: LibraryDetail.ScanTooltip
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Scan for Melodee media json files and update database data.

data.name: LibraryDetail.ScanWarning
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Scanning a library updates database information from Melodee data files.

data.name: LibraryDetail.UnlockLibrary
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Unlock library, will allow modifications.

data.name: LibraryDetail.UnlockTooltip
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Unlock library, will allow modifications.

data.name: LibraryDetail.UpdateAggregates
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Update all aggregate counts for library, including; artists, contributors and albums in library.

data.name: LibraryDetail.UpdateAggregatesTooltip
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Update all aggregate counts for library, including; artists, contributors and albums in library.

data.name: MediaAlbumDetail.AddArtistTooltip
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Add a new artist to metadata database using this artists details.

data.name: MediaAlbumDetail.IdentifyAlbum
data.value: 通过搜索提供商识别专辑。

data.name: MediaAlbumDetail.NoImagesAdded
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] No images were added to the album. Likely the image you selected was invalid.

data.name: MediaAlbumDetail.SetArtistOnSongs
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Set artist on all songs

data.name: MediaLibrary.CleanLibrary
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Clean this media library directory.

data.name: MediaLibrary.DeleteAllNotOk
data.value: 删除媒体库中所有状态为非 OK 的专辑。请注意！

data.name: MediaLibrary.DeleteAllStatus
data.value: 删除状态为 [{0}] 的所有专辑

data.name: MediaLibrary.DeleteLessThan4Songs
data.value: 删除少于 4 首歌曲的

data.name: MediaLibrary.DeleteSelectedAlbums
data.value: 删除所选媒体专辑（包括专辑文件）。请注意！

data.name: MediaLibrary.DeletingNotOkWarning
data.value: 删除所有非 OK 专辑可能会删除很多专辑

data.name: MediaLibrary.DryRunPrompt
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Do you want to perform a dry-run first to see what would change?

data.name: MediaLibrary.FindMissingImagesDescription
data.value: 这将为所有当前没有图片的专辑搜索图片。可能需要一段时间。

data.name: MediaLibrary.SelectLibraryFor
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Select the destination library for OK albums:

data.name: Message.DragAndDropImages
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Drag and drop or paste images here

data.name: Message.NoImagesFound
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] No images found for this album.

data.name: Message.ReplaceAllImagesOnUpload
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Replace all images on upload

data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Chart created but image upload failed

data.value: 榜单已创建，但条目保存失败

data.name: Notification.FailedToPauseAllJobs
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Failed to pause all jobs

data.name: Notification.FailedToResumeAllJobs
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Failed to resume all jobs

data.name: Notification.FindMissingImagesResult
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Found and set images for {0} out of {1} albums.

data.name: Notification.ScanningLibraryWarning
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Scanning a library updates the library with media found. This could overwrite artists, albums and songs.

data.name: PlaylistDetail.ImageFeatureDescription
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] This feature allows setting custom images for playlists.

data.name: PlaylistDetail.LockFeatureNotImplemented
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Playlist lock/unlock functionality is not yet fully implemented.

data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Lock playlist, will prevent modifications.

data.name: PlaylistDetail.UnlockPlaylist
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Unlock playlist, will allow modifications.

data.value: 你只能编辑自己的请求

data.value: 你只能编辑自己的请求

data.name: AdminJobs.FailedToPauseAllJobs
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Failed to pause all jobs

data.name: AdminJobs.FailedToResumeAllJobs
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Failed to resume all jobs

data.name: AdminJobs.JobsDisabledMessage
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Jobs are disabled in the appsettings.json file. Set the setting

data.name: AdminJobs.JobsDisabledMessage2
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] to "false" (or remove entirely) to enable.

data.name: ChartEditor.ChartCreatedImageFailed
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Chart created but image upload failed

data.value: 榜单已创建，但条目保存失败

data.name: ChartEditor.ConfirmDeleteImage
data.value: 确定要删除榜单图片吗？

data.name: ChartEditor.CSVContainsNoValidItems
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] CSV contains no valid items

data.name: ChartImportDialog.ChartCreatedItemsFailed
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Chart created but items failed to parse

data.name: ChartImportDialog.Error.ItemsRequired
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] 'items' array is required and must contain at least one item.

data.name: ChartImportDialog.Error.RankPositive
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Item {0}: 'rank' must be a positive integer.

data.name: ChartImportDialog.ImageDownloadErrorDetail
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Could not download image from URL

data.name: UserDetail.InvalidApiKeyFormat
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Invalid user API key format

data.name: AlbumDetail.AlbumDirectoryNotFound
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Album directory [{0}] is not found.

data.name: AlbumDetail.UploadFailedInvalidPath
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Filename contains invalid characters or path components

data.name: ArtistDetail.ArtistDirectoryNotFound
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Artist directory [{0}] is not found.

data.name: UploadAlbum.Instructions
data.value: 选择一个或多个包含专辑文件（音频文件、图片等）的ZIP文件。每个文件将被解压到入站库的新文件夹中。

data.name: UploadAlbum.MenuTooltip
data.value: 将包含专辑的ZIP文件上传到此库。

data.name: UploadAlbum.UploadCompleteDetail
data.value: 专辑文件已成功上传并解压。

data.name: UploadAlbum.InvalidZip
data.value: 上传的文件不是有效的ZIP压缩包。

data.name: AdminSettings.AllKeysExist
data.value: SettingRegistry 中的所有设置在数据库中都已有记录。

data.name: Auth.CheckEmailForResetLink
data.value: 如果该邮箱对应的账户存在，你将很快收到密码重置链接。

data.name: Auth.EmailInvalid
data.value: 请输入有效的邮箱地址

data.name: Auth.ForgotPasswordSubtitle
data.value: 输入邮箱以接收密码重置链接

data.name: Auth.InvalidOrExpiredToken
data.value: 重置链接无效或已过期

data.name: Auth.PasswordMinLength
data.value: 密码至少需要 8 个字符

data.name: Auth.PasswordResetUnavailable
data.value: 当前无法重置密码。请联系系统管理员。

data.name: Auth.PasswordsMustMatch
data.value: 两次输入的密码必须一致

data.name: Auth.TokenExpiredMessage
data.value: 该密码重置链接已过期或无效。请重新申请。

data.name: Auth.TooManyAttempts
data.value: 尝试次数过多。请稍后再试。

data.name: ArtistDetail.ValidateAlbums
data.value: 验证此艺术家的所有专辑

data.name: Stats.TopArtistsByPlays
data.value: 播放次数最多的前 10 位艺术家

data.name: Stats.TopArtistsByAlbumCount
data.value: 按专辑数量排行的前 10 位艺术家

data.name: AdminDoctor.Description
data.value: 诊断安装、配置和环境问题

data.name: AdminDoctor.JsonCopied
data.value: 诊断数据已复制到剪贴板

data.name: AdminDoctor.LibraryPathsMissing
data.value: 一个或多个库路径缺失

data.name: AdminDoctor.LibraryPathsMissingAndNotWritable
data.value: 部分库路径缺失或不可写

data.name: AdminDoctor.AllLibraryPathsOk
data.value: 所有库路径均存在且可写

data.name: AdminDoctor.SerilogPathsOk
data.value: 所有日志路径均可访问

data.name: AdminDoctor.MusicBrainzDatabaseEmpty
data.value: MusicBrainz数据库为空，需要填充数据

data.name: AdminDoctor.DiskSpaceCritical
data.value: 严重：磁盘空间严重不足

data.name: AdminDoctor.SearchEngineApiKeysMissing
data.value: 部分已启用的搜索引擎缺少API密钥

data.name: AdminDoctor.SearchEngineApiKeysOk
data.value: 所有已启用的搜索引擎均已配置API密钥

data.name: AdminDoctor.LibraryPathOverlapDetected
data.value: 检测到媒体库路径重叠 - 路径可能冲突

data.name: Dashboard.IssuesDetected
data.value: 检测到问题。请查看诊断页面了解详情。

data.name: AdminDoctor.MusicBrainzJobDescription
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Downloads and updates the local MusicBrainz database for artist and album metadata lookups.

data.name: Search.NoResultsDescription
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] We couldn't find any artists, albums, or songs matching "{0}". Try a different search term or request the music you're looking for.

data.name: Dashboard.NoArtistsFound
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] No artists found. Start by scanning your library.

data.name: Dashboard.NoAlbumsFound
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] No albums found. Start by scanning your library.

data.name: Stats.NoDataMessage
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Add albums to see statistics

data.name: Stats.NoDataHint
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Upload or scan music to get started

data.name: DynamicPlaylistImportDialog.PasteJSON
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Paste or upload dynamic playlist JSON

data.name: DynamicPlaylistImportDialog.SQLNotes
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] The songSelectionWhere and songSelectionOrder fields use PostgreSQL SQL syntax. Use table alias 's' for songs table.

data.name: DynamicPlaylistImportDialog.Error.IdRequired
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Playlist ID is required and must be a valid GUID

data.name: DynamicPlaylistImportDialog.Error.WhereRequired
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] SQL WHERE clause is required

data.name: DynamicPlaylistImportDialog.FileExistsDetail
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] A dynamic playlist with the same ID already exists: {0}

data.name: DynamicPlaylistImportDialog.ImportSuccessDetail
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Dynamic playlist '{0}' has been imported as {1}

data.name: SettingDetail.SetViaEnvironmentVariable
data.value: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] This setting is currently overridden by an environment variable
